name: chat
description: Feature-object chat surface and standalone chatroom demo.

verbs.name: match_object
verbs.source: verb :match_object(name, location) rxd { return $failed_match; }

verbs.name: match_verb
verbs.source: verb :match_verb(name, target) rxd { return $failed_match; }

verbs.name: parse_command
verbs.source: verb :parse_command(text, who) rxd { return { text: text, actor: who }; }

classes.description: Stable sentinel returned when no visible object matches.
Stable sentinel returned when multiple visible objects match.
Standalone chat room class whose behavior comes from $conversational.

A talkative bird. Cheap imitation of the LambdaMOO cockatoo (#1479): squawks random phrases, can be taught new ones, gagged when too noisy. Self-driven timer chatter is deferred until DSL exposes fork; for now squawking is actor-driven.

verbs.name: look
verbs.source: verb :look() rxd { let state = this.mood; if (this.gagged) { state = "gagged"; } observe({ type: "cockatoo_seen", source: this, actor: actor, mood: state, ts: now() }); return { description: this.description, mood: state, phrase_count: length(this.phrases) }; }

verbs.name: squawk
verbs.source: verb :squawk() rxd { if (this.gagged) { observe({ type: "cockatoo_muffled", source: this, actor: actor, ts: now() }); return "*muffled noises*"; } let phrases = this.phrases; if (length(phrases) == 0) { return ""; } let phrase = phrases[random(length(phrases)) + 1]; observe({ type: "cockatoo_squawk", source: this, actor: actor, text: phrase, ts: now() }); return phrase; }

verbs.name: teach
verbs.source: verb :teach(phrase) rx { if (typeof(phrase) != "string") { raise { code: "E_TYPE", message: "teach requires a string phrase", value: phrase }; } if (!phrase) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "teach requires a non-empty phrase" }; } this.phrases = this.phrases + [phrase]; observe({ type: "cockatoo_taught", source: this, actor: actor, phrase: phrase, ts: now() }); return length(this.phrases); }

verbs.name: pluck
verbs.source: verb :pluck() rxd { observe({ type: "cockatoo_pluck", source: this, actor: actor, text: "*EEEEEEK!*", ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: shake
verbs.source: verb :shake() rxd { let reactions = this.shake_reactions; if (length(reactions) == 0) { return ""; } let reaction = reactions[random(length(reactions)) + 1]; observe({ type: "cockatoo_shake", source: this, actor: actor, reaction: reaction, ts: now() }); return reaction; }

verbs.name: feed
verbs.source: verb :feed(food) rxd { let snack = food; if (!snack) { snack = "birdseed"; } observe({ type: "cockatoo_fed", source: this, actor: actor, food: snack, ts: now() }); return snack; }

verbs.name: gag
verbs.source: verb :gag() rx { this.gagged = true; observe({ type: "cockatoo_gagged", source: this, actor: actor, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: ungag
verbs.source: verb :ungag() rx { this.gagged = false; observe({ type: "cockatoo_ungagged", source: this, actor: actor, ts: now() }); return true; }

features.description: Feature object carrying live chat verbs for spaces.

verbs.name: can_be_attached_by
verbs.source: verb :can_be_attached_by(who) rxd { return true; }

verbs.name: say
verbs.source: verb :say(text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "say requires text" }; } observe({ type: "said", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: emote
verbs.source: verb :emote(text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "emote requires text" }; } observe({ type: "emoted", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: tell
verbs.source: verb :tell(recipient, text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "tell requires text" }; } observe({ type: "told", from: actor, to: recipient, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: look
verbs.source: verb :look() rxd { return { description: this.description, present_actors: this.subscribers }; }

verbs.name: who
verbs.source: verb :who() rxd { return this.subscribers; }

verbs.name: enter
verbs.source: verb :enter(who) rxd { let entrant = actor; if (!(entrant in this.subscribers)) { this.subscribers = this.subscribers + [entrant]; } if (!(this in entrant.presence_in)) { entrant.presence_in = entrant.presence_in + [this]; } observe({ type: "entered", actor: entrant, ts: now() }); return this.subscribers; }

verbs.name: leave
verbs.source: verb :leave(who) rxd { let leaver = actor; let subscribers = []; for item in this.subscribers { if (item != leaver) { subscribers = subscribers + [item]; } } this.subscribers = subscribers; let spaces = []; for item in leaver.presence_in { if (item != this) { spaces = spaces + [item]; } } leaver.presence_in = spaces; observe({ type: "left", actor: leaver, ts: now() }); return this.subscribers; }

verbs.name: command
verbs.source: verb :command(text) rxd { return this:say(text); }

seed_hooks.name: Lobby
seed_hooks.description: The first runnable chat room. It is a live lobby where connected actors can speak, emote, tell, look, and see who is present through the $conversational feature.

seed_hooks.name: Cockatoo
seed_hooks.description: A sulphur-crested cockatoo sitting in a cage on top of the mantelpiece. Inside the cage are a few bird-toys, a mirror, and a tray for its food and water. (Cheap imitation of LambdaMOO #1479; aliases there: cockatoo, cock, raven, bird, cuckatoo, duck.)
